programme.title: Last Man Standing: Found Money
programme.desc: When Vanessa's sweet but flighty sister comes to visit, Mike knows she's only coming to ask for yet another loan. Meanwhile, when Kristen and Kyle decide to break up, Kyle is more concerned with what Mike will think.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Voting
programme.desc: Mike tries to persuade Mandy to vote for Romney in her first election.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: If They Do Go Either Way They're Usually Fake
programme.desc: Judith is upset when she learns that Jake has seen a tattoo on a surfer's nude behind. Alan grows suspicious when Judith and the surfer become good friends. Charlie teaches Jake about the difference between real breasts and implants.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Twenty-Five Little Pre-Pubers Without a Snootful
programme.desc: When Alan and Judith argue during a rehearsal for Jake's play, Charlie is stuck handling a roomful of fourth graders by himself. Charlie then uses his jingle-writing experience to craft the play -- with an interesting outcome.

programme.title: Countdown to Daytona
programme.desc: Host Dan Lucas takes us behind-the-scenes of Daytona to look at the pressure of winning the Daytona 500, why it's such an accomplishment to win this race and who are the favorites to win this year's competition.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Inadvertent Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel is excited about her interview for a position with a famous clothing designer.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Molly's Out of Town
programme.desc: Mike goes on a junk food binge to cope with missing Molly while she is out of town for a teacher’s conference. Meanwhile, Carl contemplates leaving Chicago after learning heartbreaking news from James.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: School Recital
programme.desc: Molly is so focused on directing a school recital that she doesn't realize a fellow teacher is hitting on her. Meanwhile, Vince convinces Mike to join him in an unusual money-making scheme.

programme.title: Serving While Black: The Greatest Generation
Hidden History: Celebrating Black History Month
programme.desc: A look at African Americans who have made an impact throughout history.

programme.title: Mom: Zombies and Cobb Salad
programme.desc: When Bonnie loses her job and struggles to keep her life together, Christy tries to get her back on track.

programme.title: Mom: Belgian Waffles and Bathroom Privileges
programme.desc: Christy has trouble accepting how much easier life is with Bonnie in the house. Meanwhile, Baxter sets up camp in the driveway.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Last Thing You Want Is to Wind Up With a Hump
programme.desc: After a wild night in Vegas, Charlie reluctantly attends Jake's soccer game where he discovers the hidden dating potentials.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Did You Check With the Captain of the Flying Monkeys?
programme.desc: Charlie rethinks his ways after he, Alan and Jake must cheer up a dejected Evelyn. Meanwhile, Charlie teaches Jake some lessons about screening calls from women.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rachel Smokes
programme.desc: Rachel feigns a smoking habit in order to please her boss and climb the career ladder.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross Can't Flirt
programme.desc: Ross finds his flirting skills rusty when he and Chandler vie for the attention of a girl.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: The Most Blunder-full Time of Year
programme.desc: An inflatable reindeer gets frisky with a reporter, a couple of speedboaters go way overboard, and a jockey has an embarrassing wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: Snow and Tell
programme.desc: A weathercaster has an embarrassing slip of the tongue, a kid uses the sled and string method to pull a loose tooth, and an actor creates his own wind on live TV.

programme.title: Wipeout: Hillbilly Wipeout
programme.desc: A down home Hillbilly, a Critter Snatcher and a Bug Muncher attend Wipeout's Country Fair before they take on the 'Hill-Bullies' in the Petrified Forest.

programme.title: In Search Ministries
programme.desc: Every worldview involves faith in some form; a commitment to applying reason and evidence to our search for ultimate answers to life's big questions.

programme.title: Freethought Matters: Ed Asner
programme.desc: A discussion with leading freethought authors, thinkers and activists.

programme.title: Elementary: The Woman
programme.desc: As Sherlock reels at the reappearance of his former lover, Irene Adler, a series of flashbacks unravels the events that led to his downfall into addiction. Meanwhile, he and Joan are once again in the crosshairs of the enigmatic Moriarty.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: While attending a Phillies baseball game, Murray says Adam is old enough to leave his seat on his own. When a nervous Adam leaves, he immediately gets flustered and gets lost at the stadium.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Adam Bomb
programme.desc: When Erica gets inspired to put college on hold in favour of pursuing a singing career, Beverly is worried that she will be disappointed if her dream does not come true. Beverly puts Murray up to the task to have to talk with Erica about her future.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Full Court Press With Greta Van Susteren
programme.desc: A look at the impact of politics and policy on the American people.

programme.title: Movie: The Hudsucker Proxy
programme.desc: A naïve Indiana boy goes to New York in 1958 to sell his idea for the hula hoop.

programme.title: Movie: Lost in America
programme.desc: A successful man, sick and disheartened with corporate America, takes to the road.

programme.title: Movie: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: A group of thieves are plotting to rob a casino and hide out in an elderly woman's basement.

programme.title: Movie: Bruce Almighty
programme.desc: Bruce, a dissatisfied reporter, finds himself endowed with God's powers. At first he is delighted with all of the things he can do, but he quickly learns how difficult it can be to run the world.

programme.title: Movie: Little
programme.desc: A woman with a high-pressure career is transformed into a younger version of herself.

programme.title: Movie: Corky Romano
programme.desc: The black sheep of a mob family pretends to be a thug to help his dad infiltrate the FBI.

programme.title: Movie: Puerto Ricans in Paris
programme.desc: Two Puerto Rican detectives, Luis and Eddie, are sent to Paris to find the stolen handbag designs of a major fashion designer. The hopelessly unhip pair attempt to navigate the city as they deal with high society fashion and its seedy black market.

programme.title: HBO Comedy Half Hour: Janeane Garofalo
Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: Hello, Dolly!
programme.desc: A widow tries to find a new wife for a widowed merchant, despite her feelings for him.

programme.title: Movie: Jungle Master
programme.desc: A girl named Rainie runs away from home and is transported to a magical jungle realm where she makes new friends and helps to save the rainforest from a nasty bossman.

programme.title: Movie: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When the Clampett family strikes oil in the Ozark swamps, they move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Gulliver's Travels
programme.desc: A travel writer becomes shipwrecked on an island where he is much taller than the tiny citizens that inhabit it.

programme.title: Movie: College
programme.desc: During an orientation visit at Fieldmont University, best friends Kevin, Carter and Morris fall in with one of the rowdiest fraternities on campus. As new recruits, they are subjected to endless humiliations and to the no-holds-barred college party scene.

programme.title: Movie: Big Trouble in Little China
programme.desc: A trucker helps his friend rescue his fiancée from an ancient Chinese sorcerer, who must wed her to be freed from his prison.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Kick the Can
programme.desc: A World Series ring from the 1995 Atlanta Braves slides into the shop. Corey and the Old Man hear the sweet sound of cash when a Sho-Bud steel guitar comes in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Dirty Sox
programme.desc: A baseball signed by members of the infamous 1919 Chicago Black Sox has Rick and Corey seeing green. Four original paintings by Andy Warhol brush by.

programme.title: Jim Crow: Freedoms Deferred
programme.desc: Despite the Civil War victory that granted slaves their freedom, Jim Crow laws helped maintain a segregated society and severely limited opportunities for Blacks. Learn the evolution of Jim Crow laws and see the people who were impacted by these rulings.

programme.title: Roads to Freedom
programme.desc: This special reveals some historic sites in the Washington, D.C. area that you may never have heard of, let alone visited. It examines Harper's Ferry where John Brown stuck a dagger in the heart of slavery, and the battlefields of Petersburg, Virginia.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ride Along
programme.desc: Joey throws himself in front of Ross when he thinks he hears the sound of a gun.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ball
programme.desc: Ross and Joey's friendly game of catch turns into a game of nerves when Monica joins in.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black History Month
programme.desc: Dre is upset after he learns that Jack and Diane are getting the same surface-level education about Black History Month that he got when he was growing up.

programme.title: Black-ish: Inheritance
programme.desc: Dre's sister Rhonda is in town and Ruby has a talk with them about her inheritance. Meanwhile, Bow’s sister Santamonica is also in town and she hires Junior to become her assistant.

programme.title: Batwoman: Take Your Choie
programme.desc: As Kate is pulled between two sisters, Luke and Mary are tasked with finding the cause behind Beth's headaches. A visitor brings Jacob good news, Sophie takes her new role to the extreme, and Alice makes a devastating discovery.

programme.title: Supergirl: Back From the Future: Part Two
programme.desc: Supergirl helps Winn face his greatest fear. After Alex sets out to find evidence against Lex, Brainy must decide between helping his friend or continuing to secretly work for Lex.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Sponge
programme.desc: Elaine discovers that the company for her birth control items has gone out of business.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Gum
programme.desc: Kramer persuades everyone to try a stick of his nervous friend's Chinese gum. Elaine accidentally reveals herself to Kramer and his rattled friend, Lloyd.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Big Break
programme.desc: Joey lands a lead feature-film role but soon learns the fickle ways of show business.

programme.title: Friends: The One in Vegas
programme.desc: The gang goes to Las Vegas when Chandler wants to surprise Joey and mend their friendship.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Jessica Shmessica
programme.desc: When Bobby invites Caroline to a party to meet his family, she is eager to make a good impression but isn't prepared for the torch that his mother and sisters still carry for his ex-girlfriend. Also, Caroline's nerves are frayed when the gang tags along.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Dad Day Afternoon
programme.desc: When Han's new therapist suggests that Max needs to confront her 'daddy issues' and fear of intimacy, she reluctantly heads to Rhode Island to track down her birth father. Also, Oleg is up in arms when Sophie wants him to help out around the house.

programme.title: Entertainers With Byron Allen
programme.desc: Segment features James Marsden, Charlie Hunnam, Lucy Hale, O'Shea Jackson Jr, Nicole Kidman, Jonny Loquasto, the cast of 'Locke & Key', Karen Gillian, and Matt Damon.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Best Pranks in the Park!
programme.desc: Hilarious pranks are played on unsuspecting people and the results are caught on tape.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Best Restaurant Pranks!
programme.desc: Hilarious pranks are played on unsuspecting people and the results are caught on tape.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Tiffany Haddish, Louie Anderson, Bill Bellamy, Jodi Miller, and Gabriel Iglesias.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Update Show: Marriage Mayhem
programme.desc: Find out if their marriages survived when Judges Keith and Dana Cutler deliver updates from some of the most outrageous couples who appeared in their courtroom!

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Assault With a Deadly Candle/ Ice Fishing Fisticuffs
programme.desc: Man accuses ex-girlfriend of intentionally causing him harm; A scuffle between ice fishing enthusiast.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Ice Skating Impediment/ Park Somewhere Else
programme.desc: An ice skater is injured and blames the overcrowded rink; a tandem parking spot leads to a dispute between roommates.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Seaton vs. McPeek
programme.desc: She believed her mother’s deceased lover was her biological father, until a medical emergency proved it wasn’t possible and a 30-year secret was revealed.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Car Flipping Flop/ High School Me Not!
programme.desc: Plaintiff sues over unpaid loan for used car business; a dispute over GED classes.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Sex for Rent
programme.desc: Briana claims to be in love with another woman's man, and is tired of being the other woman to Chris and wants to remove his girlfriend Taylar from the picture.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman is suing her ex-husband for emotional distress saying he was a physically abusive crack addict who left her for another woman and was never a part of their four children’s lives.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Burning a Bride; Unloading on a Landlubber; Losing Control.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Thrown/ Tacky Nail Tech
programme.desc: Father sues for medical expenses; woman sues nail salon over sloppy pedicure.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: An ex-boyfriend is sued for property damage and theft of a cell phone; the defendant says that his ex-girlfriend is an angry woman who took his assistance check without authority. Then, a dispute over a car accident and lost wages.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Accused of Murdering My Best Friend
programme.desc: Aaliyah is suspected of knowing more than she's letting on about the mysterious death of Mariah. Then, Susan and Dianna point fingers at each other over the death of Kallie.

programme.title: Maury: My Husband's an Idiot ... Help Me Prove He's the Father Again!
programme.desc: Georgio thinks his girlfriend Biljana is a cheater, and that he's not the father of her baby. Kasharae wants to prove to Carlton and his mom that Carlton's her son's father. Annie and Leonard are back for a paternity test.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Meme Girls
programme.desc: Liz says a female has been a bit too social with her husband, Sanford. She suspects him of hooking up with a woman named Chassity. Then, April has a secret to tell her boyfriend Mark that could put an end to their relationship.

programme.title: High Maintenance: Trick
programme.desc: The Guy, with new canine friend 'Fomo' in tow, delivers to Matthew, a man looking for a connection who hires a new-to-the-business escort for the night. Intimacy coordinator Kym learns a surprising fact about her new love interest.

programme.title: Avenue 5: Wait a Minute, Then Who Was That on the Ladder?
programme.desc: Iris arranges a passenger meet-and-greet with Judd. Ryan and Billie grow frustrated by a bridge crew that has no real answers.

programme.title: Movie: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: When his wife wins custody of their children, an actor poses as a female housekeeper in order to spend time with them.

programme.title: Curb Your Enthusiasm: You're Not Going to Get Me to Say Anything Bad About Mickey
programme.desc: Travel plans go awry when Larry brings an impromptu date to a destination wedding. At the hotel, Larry finds himself in a sticky situation when he goes searching for a toothbrush.

programme.title: Movie: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Two police officers uncover a counterfeiting ring in Hong Kong and try to bring it down.

programme.title: Movie: Scary Movie 3
programme.desc: A girl investigates crop circles and video tapes while preventing an alien invasion.

programme.title: Movie: Blindspotting
programme.desc: With only three days left on his probation, Collin is determined to avoid even a small hint of illegal activity, but with his unstable best friend Miles causing trouble the two end up on a collision course that could jeopardize Collin's freedom.

programme.title: Movie: Wedding Daze
programme.desc: After losing the woman of his dreams, a man is convinced he'll never fall in love again. His best friend dares him to propose to a waitress. The dare evolves into the kind of love that both have been looking for all along.

programme.title: Movie: Out to Sea
programme.desc: A lighthearted senior convinces his friend to pose as a dance host on a party cruise.

programme.title: Movie: Baby's Day Out
programme.desc: A kidnapped baby escapes from bumbling criminals into downtown Chicago.

programme.title: One Night Stand: Jimmy Tingle
programme.desc: Up-and-coming talent as well as seasoned performers take the stage before a live audience.

programme.title: Movie: The Thing About My Folks
programme.desc: A middle aged man must deal with his own emotional issues when his elderly parents divorce.

programme.title: Movie: True Lies
programme.desc: A secret agent on the trail of a group of terrorists puts his family at risk when they discover his true identity.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: When a happily married man realizes that he is gay, he decides to live life to the fullest, which lands him in jail.

programme.title: Movie: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: After his son witnesses a murder, an FBI agent goes undercover at an all-girl's school to find the murderer.

programme.title: Movie: Gone Fishin'
programme.desc: Two buddies win a vacation and get involved with a con who ripped off his ex-wives.

programme.title: Movie: Flawless
programme.desc: A homophobic, retired security guard takes singing lessons from his drag queen neighbour to rehabilitate after suffering a stroke.
